name: landing-craft
description: End-to-end landing-page workflow for AI agents. Orchestrates 8 specialist sub-agents — strategy, copy, design, build, motion, polish, SEO, review — through a phased pipeline to ship a modern, elegant, intuitive, high-converting landing that does NOT look AI-generated. Triggers: build/create a landing page, marketing site, product page, sales page, hero, waitlist, 'armame una landing', 'landing que venda'. Commands: /landing-new, /landing-build, /landing-review, /landing-ship. Next.js + Tailwind by default; framework-agnostic.
